summary: Machine-readable capability map for AI agents. This is not a public MCP server and not a guarantee that every tool is externally callable today.
principles: Read and draft before asking to publish or send.
Publishing, payments, mass changes, customer messages and destructive actions require human approval.
Incomplete data must be labelled as incomplete.
Every agent action should be recorded in the action ledger.

scope_legend.audit:read: Read listing audit and card diagnostics.
scope_legend.services:draft: Draft service names, descriptions and optimization suggestions.
scope_legend.content:draft: Draft posts, news and content plans.
scope_legend.finance:read: Read finance dashboard, KPI and data-quality summaries.
scope_legend.partners:read: Read partnership candidates and supervised outreach context.
scope_legend.publish:request: Request publication or external action through human approval.

tools.name: listing.audit.read
tools.purpose: Read listing audit facts, strengths, weak spots and recommended next actions.
limits: If source data is old or partial, mark it as partial.

tools.name: growth.plan.draft
tools.purpose: Draft a plan for today, 7 days and regular work to improve leads, trust, average ticket and repeat visits.
limits: Recommendations must be tied to available facts.

tools.name: services.optimize.draft
tools.purpose: Draft improved service names and descriptions with SEO keys and industry guardrails.
limits: Do not add medical promises, unsupported effects, fake prices or unsupported attributes.

tools.name: reviews.reply.draft
tools.purpose: Draft short replies to reviews, mentioning the reviewed service when known and softly suggesting adjacent services when appropriate.
limits: Do not promise fixes or compensation without confirmation.

tools.name: content.post.draft
tools.purpose: Draft posts, updates and content-plan items for maps and social channels.
limits: Do not invent promotions, prices, addresses, credentials or unsupported services.

tools.name: finance.summary.read
tools.purpose: Read first-step financial control: revenue, expenses, margin, occupancy, rebooking, no-shows, data quality and red zones.
limits: Do not give precise conclusions when expenses, costs or period data are missing.

tools.name: partners.candidates.read
tools.purpose: Read supervised partnership candidates and context for local collaboration.
limits: Sending outreach is not allowed without approval.

tools.name: agent.self_test
tools.purpose: Validate an agent key, status and scopes, then write a safe self-test ledger record.

tools.name: approval.request.create
tools.purpose: Create a human approval request for high-risk or externally visible action.
limits: This records a request only. It does not execute the action.

tools.name: publish.request
tools.purpose: Request publishing a post, review reply or external-system change after human review.
limits: Direct publish is blocked. Use approval flow.

not_available_yet: Stable public OpenAPI for all product workflows
Autonomous publishing to maps or social channels
